meanings.definition: assets that are saleable though not material or physical
(of especially business assets) not having physical substance or intrinsic productive value
examples: intangible assets such as good will

meanings.definition: incapable of being perceived by the senses especially the sense of touch; - James Jeans
hard to pin down or identify
examples: an intangible feeling of impending disaster

meanings.definition: lacking substance or reality; incapable of being touched or seen
